name: openspec-doc-team
description: Professional document generation team: 4 roles (lead editor + researcher + generator + auditor) orchestrate a 6-phase workflow to produce enterprise-grade long documents (construction design specs, technical proposals, bid documents, maintenance manuals, API docs).

profession.zh: 企业级长文档生成工坊

displayDescription.en: 4 roles collaborate across 6 phases (requirement analysis → retrieval → generation → audit loop → assembly → delivery) to produce compliance-ready long documents: construction design specs, technical proposals, bid docs, maintenance manuals, API/system docs, and more.
displayDescription.zh: 4 位专业角色分 6 阶段协作完成企业级长文档生成：需求分析 → 知识检索 → 内容生成 → 质量审核（循环）→ 整合汇编 → 交付输出。适用于施工图设计说明、技术方案、招投标文件、维修手册、API/系统文档等场景。

defaultInitPrompt.en: Generate an architectural construction drawing design specification for me
defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我生成一份建筑施工图设计说明
